productDisplayName: Tantra Kid's Unisex Meet My Daddy Red Kidswear
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroideryGet daddy to break into a smile when he comes home after a hectic day at work with this absolutely cute t-shirt from tantra.
